title: I'll Love You Always
writer: Lawrence Hazard, Vera Caspary, Sidney Buchman
actors: Nancy Carroll, George Murphy, Raymond Walburn
plot: Nora Clegg, an actress, marries Carl Brent, an unemployed young engineer, whose estimation of his worth and ability keeps him from getting a job. He finally acquires a position that will require him to go to Russia for a period of...
